title: Any2Policy: Learning Visuomotor Policy with Any-Modality
title_zh: Any2Policy: 学习任意模态的视觉运动策略
abstract: Humans can communicate and observe media with different modalities, such as texts, sounds, and images. For robots to be more generalizable embodied agents, they should be capable of following instructions and perceiving the world with adaptation to diverse modalities. Current robotic learning methodologies often focus on single-modal task specification and observation, thereby limiting their ability to process rich multi-modal information. Addressing this limitation, we present an end-to-end general-purpose multi-modal system named Any-to-Policy Embodied Agents. This system empowers robots to handle tasks using various modalities, whether in combinations like text-image, audio-image, text-point cloud, or in isolation. Our innovative approach involves training a versatile modality network that adapts to various inputs and connects with policy networks for effective control. Because of the lack of existing multi-modal robotics datasets for evaluation, we assembled a comprehensive real-world dataset encompassing 30 robotic tasks. Each task in this dataset is richly annotated across multiple modalities, providing a robust foundation for assessment. We conducted extensive validation of our proposed unified modality embodied agent using several simulation benchmarks, including Franka Kitchen and Maniskill2, as well as in our real-world settings. Our experiments showcase the promising capability of building embodied agents that can adapt to diverse multi-modal in a unified framework.
abstract_zh: 人类可以通过文本、声音和图像等不同模态进行交流和观察。为了使机器人成为更具泛化能力的具身智能体，它们应能遵循指令并适应多种模态来感知世界。当前的机器人学习方法通常专注于单模态的任务规范和观测，从而限制了其处理丰富多模态信息的能力。为解决这一局限，我们提出了一种端到端的通用多模态系统，名为“任意到策略具身智能体”。该系统使机器人能够处理各种模态的任务，无论是文本-图像、音频-图像、文本-点云等组合，还是单一模态。我们的创新方法涉及训练一个通用的模态网络，该网络适应各种输入，并与策略网络连接以实现有效控制。由于缺乏用于评估的现有多模态机器人数据集，我们构建了一个包含30个机器人任务的综合真实世界数据集。该数据集中的每个任务都通过多种模态进行了丰富的标注，为评估提供了坚实基础。我们使用多个仿真基准（包括Franka Kitchen和Maniskill2）以及真实环境，对我们提出的统一模态具身智能体进行了广泛验证。实验展示了在统一框架中构建能够适应多种多模态的具身智能体的有前景的能力。
tldr_zh: 提出统一多模态框架，使机器人能处理文本、图像、音频等任意模态的任务。
cover_zh: 机器人终于能听懂人话、看懂图片、听懂声音了｜一个框架搞定所有模态
